data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces user decision time by simplifying choices on the interface.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Spotify interfaces are designed to align with user expectations from common digital experiences.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user satisfaction through an aesthetically pleasing interface that facilitates usability.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Breaks down complex information into chunks to aid user comprehension.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures ease of access to frequently used functions through optimal button and interface placement.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas, optimized button placement
